audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. GasLimitCapTxValidator enforces tx.GasLimit <= 16777216 when EIP-7825 is enabled (line 388 uses > comparison, rejecting strictly greater values). Validator is integrated into all 5 TxValidator transaction type paths (Legacy, AccessList, EIP1559, Blob, SetCode at lines 28,40,51,64,76) and executed via MalformedTxFilter in txpool's preHash filter chain (TxPool.cs:151), blocking acceptance before txpool admission.
